title: Nightmare Mod
description: A mod that adds new items and new mobs to the game.
body:
This is a mod which adds 9 new mobs(including 2 bosses) and 11 new items. It also adds a custom spawning ore called magnetite. Also add 2 new structures

To add it to a survival world put it in your mods folder. However to add this to a server put it in both the servers mod folder and anyone who plays on the server's mods folder
